'''CZ-22''' was a battered [[CZ-series secretary/comm droid]] that served as the controller of the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on [[Engebo V]]. The droid's work involved welcoming committee and customs inspections.

==Appearances==
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20011018a|text=Death, Dirt, and the Nerf Rancher's Daughter|int=Death, Dirt, and the Nerf Rancher's Daughter}}
